modules.name: chess
modules.description: Board state, full ruleset enforcement, move validation, game lifecycle, temporal replay index

modules.name: tournament
modules.description: Bracket construction, entry fee collection, round progression, automated prize settlement

modules.name: wager
modules.description: Non-custodial escrow, match staking, cryptographic outcome resolution

native_feature.name: auto-signing
native_feature.description: Players grant a single scoped session grant before a match. All subsequent moves are submitted as background transactions with zero wallet interruption for the duration of the session.
